name: LSASS Memory Access
description: Detects suspicious access to LSASS process memory for credential theft
query:
// LSASS Memory Access Detection
// Process accessing LSASS memory
events from endpoint
where target_process_name = "lsass.exe"
  and event_type = "process_access"
  and access_mask contains "PROCESS_VM_READ"
group by hostname, username, process_name
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
